Daily Practice
7-Minute
Morning
Mobility
Hips · Lower back · Glute activation
5 exercises No equipment Before coffee
```
Exercise 01 / 0560 sec each side
90/90 Hip Stretch
1
Sit on the floor with both knees bent at 90 degrees — one in front, one out to the side.
2
Sit tall first, then hinge forward from your hips with a flat back — not rounded.
3
Hold the forward lean for the full 60 seconds. Breathe. Switch sides and repeat.
Exercise 02 / 0545 sec each side
Kneeling Hip Flexor Stretch
1
Kneel with one knee on the floor, the other foot forward in a low lunge.
2
Tuck your pelvis under slightly, then press your hips gently forward.
3
Feel the stretch in the front of the back hip, not the knee. Hold, breathe, switch.
Exercise 03 / 053 sets of 8 reps
Glute Bridge
1
Lie on your back, knees bent, feet flat on the floor hip-width apart.
2
Drive through your heels to lift your hips until shoulders, hips and knees form a straight line.
3
Squeeze your glutes hard at the top. Hold 2 seconds. Lower slowly.
Exercise 04 / 0510 slow repetitions
Cat-Cow
1
Start on hands and knees, wrists under shoulders, knees under hips.
2
CAT — exhale: round your spine toward the ceiling, drop your head, tuck your tailbone.
3
COW — inhale: let your belly drop, lift your head and tailbone, arch gently.
4
Move slowly with your breath — 10 full cycles.
Exercise 05 / 053 reps each side
World's Greatest Stretch
1
Step into a deep lunge, drop your back knee to the floor.
2
Place the same-side hand as your front foot on the floor inside your front foot.
3
Rotate your torso open toward the front leg, reaching your top arm toward the ceiling.
4
Hits hip flexors, thoracic spine, and hamstrings in one move. Switch sides.
🌿
Done. Good morning.
Seven minutes. Hips open, spine awake, glutes primed. Now go get that coffee.
```
